evals.name: login-page-replication
evals.prompt: I want to replicate this login page design. Please design it in Stitch first to match the layout exactly, then use the build skill to create the Next.js components and page.
evals.expected_output: A Stitch screen representing the login page and Next.js React components (LoginForm, Layout) in the project.

evals.name: hero-section-replication
evals.prompt: Create a hero section based on this description: A bold, dark-themed hero with a neon gradient button and a glassmorphism card on the right. Design it in Stitch and then implement it in Next.js.
evals.expected_output: A Stitch screen with the described hero section and a corresponding Hero.tsx component in Next.js.
